allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement PathMate social rideshare core features

- Add direction-based matching algorithm for same-direction rides
- Integrate Supabase for auth, database, and real-time features
- Add Google Maps integration with route display and autocomplete
- Create authentication flow with email/password and Google OAuth
- Add real-time tracking with driver location broadcasts
- Include PostGIS database schema with spatial queries
- Support multi-currency pricing \(NGN, USD, EUR, GBP\)

Core components:
- AuthScreen: Login/signup with Google OAuth
- SearchRide: Find rides with map-based pickup selection
- PostRide: Create rides with route visualization
- LiveTracker: Real-time driver tracking during rides
- RouteMap: Display routes with markers
- PlacesAutocomplete: Address input with suggestions

Services:
- matchingService: Direction-based ride matching
- geoService: Distance, polyline, detour calculations
- Supabase client with auth context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
